get.summary: ListArticles lists articles within a space with optional filters.

post.summary: CreateArticle creates an article and its first version.
Resolve returns article summaries for the given ids with RBAC applied

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ResolveRequest selects articles by id within the given spaces.

get.summary: Search runs fast full-text search over title, tags and plaintext (no vector).

parameters.name: tag_match
parameters.description:
How to combine the tag filter.

 - TAG_MATCH_ALL: Default: match articles having ALL listed tags (AND).
 - TAG_MATCH_ANY: Match articles having ANY listed tag (OR).

post.summary:
SemanticSearch runs hybrid retrieval (vector + full-text, RRF) and returns
chunks plus optional citations.
Suggest runs hybrid retrieval with cross-encoder rerank for operator assist.

get.summary: ListFiles returns the files attached to an article.

parameters.name: article_etag
parameters.description: Concurrency token / locator of the owning article.

delete.summary: DeleteFile unbinds and removes a file from an article.

parameters.name: article_etag
parameters.description: Concurrency token / locator of the owning article.

get.summary: ListVersions returns the version history of an article (newest first).
GetVersion returns a single version by number.

post.summary: RestoreVersion creates a new version from a past one.

get.summary: LocateArticle returns a single article by etag.

parameters.name: etag
parameters.description: Concurrency token of the article to delete.

put.summary: UpdateArticle updates an article, creating a new version (optimistic lock via etag).

parameters.name: etag
parameters.description: Concurrency token of the article to update.

patch.summary: UpdateArticle updates an article, creating a new version (optimistic lock via etag).

parameters.name: etag
parameters.description: Concurrency token of the article to update.

post.summary: MoveArticle reparents an article, validating cycles and max depth.

parameters.name: etag
parameters.description: Concurrency token of the article to move.

get.summary: ListAncestors returns the ancestor chain (root first), serving breadcrumbs.
ListChildren returns the direct children of an article.
ListModels returns models available to the caller's domain (and globals).
LocateModel returns a single model by id.

post.summary: ValidateModel runs a test embed/rerank call and stamps validated_at on success.

get.summary: ListSpaces returns spaces in the caller's domain.

post.summary: CreateSpace creates a space; language is immutable after creation.

get.summary: LocateSpace returns a single space by id.

delete.summary: DeleteSpace deletes a space; a space with active articles cannot be deleted.

put.summary: UpdateSpace updates a space (language cannot be changed).

patch.summary: UpdateSpace updates a space (language cannot be changed).

get.summary:
Menu lists child articles of a parent for bot menu buttons; FAQ children
include their body inline.

parameters.name: parent_id
parameters.description: Parent article id; 0 for top level.

get.summary: SuggestTags returns existing tags in a space matching a prefix.
GetTree returns the article hierarchy of a space, RBAC filtered.

google.protobuf.NullValue.description:
`NullValue` is a singleton enumeration to represent the null value for the
`Value` type union.

The JSON representation for `NullValue` is JSON `null`.

 - NULL_VALUE: Null value.

parent_id.description: Parent article id; 0 for a top-level article.

published_version_id.description: Published version id; 0 if not yet published.

updated_by.description: User who last updated the article.

etag.description: Concurrency token encoding id and ver.

webitel.kb.Article.description: Article is the article read model.

webitel.kb.ArticleList.description: ArticleList is a page of articles.

parent_id.description: Parent article id; 0 for a top-level article.

snippet.description: Short text excerpt for previews and search hits.

body.description: FAQ body inlined for menu responses; empty otherwise.

webitel.kb.ArticleSummary.description:
ArticleSummary is a lightweight read model of an article, used by list,
search, resolve and menu responses (no body unless inlined for FAQ menu).

version_number.description: Monotonic version number within the article.

restored_from.description: Version this one was restored from; 0 if authored directly.

webitel.kb.ArticleVersion.description: ArticleVersion is an immutable snapshot of article content.

webitel.kb.ArticleVersionList.description: ArticleVersionList is a page of versions.

new_parent_id.description: New parent id; 0 to move to top level.

version_id.description: Article version the chunk was produced from.

chunk_index.description: Ordinal position of the chunk within the version.

score.description: Relevance score assigned by retrieval (higher is better).

webitel.kb.Chunk.description:
Chunk is a contiguous slice of an article version, the unit returned by
semantic search and consumed by downstream RAG.

url.description: Deep link to the source article.

webitel.kb.Citation.description:
Citation is a structured source reference returned alongside retrieval
results; rendering is up to the consumer (chips, spoken, or suppressed).

domain_id.description: Owning domain id; 0 for a global (Webitel-seeded) model.

name.description: Human-readable name shown in the admin UI.

provider.description: Provider key (gemini, openai, cohere, azure, bge-m3, e5, bge-reranker, byom).

model_ref.description: Provider model name or HuggingFace id.

validated_at.description: Timestamp of the last successful validation (epoch ms); 0 if never validated.

webitel.kb.EmbeddingModel.description: EmbeddingModel is a registry entry read model (credential omitted).

webitel.kb.EmbeddingModelList.description: EmbeddingModelList is a page of models.

webitel.kb.File.description: File is metadata of a stored file bound to an article.

webitel.kb.FileList.description: FileList is a page of files.

webitel.kb.GetTreeResponse.description: GetTreeResponse returns the root nodes of the space tree.

parent_id.description: Parent article id; 0 for a top-level article.

body_rich_text.description: Editor document; serialized server-side to markdown/plaintext/tsvector.

webitel.kb.InputArticle.description: InputArticle carries the writable fields of an article and its body.

model_ref.description: Provider model name or HuggingFace id.

api_key.description: Write-only provider credential; encrypted at rest, never read back.

webitel.kb.InputEmbeddingModel.description: InputEmbeddingModel carries the writable fields of a model.

vector_search_enabled.description: Whether articles are embedded for vector search.

home_article_id.description: Article used as the space home page.

team_ids.description:
Team ids the space is bound to as default operator visibility;
the set replaces the current binding, empty removes it.

webitel.kb.InputSpace.description: InputSpace carries the writable fields of a space.

items.description: Child article summaries (FAQ children include body inline).

webitel.kb.MenuResponse.description: MenuResponse returns child articles for menu rendering.

space_ids.description: Spaces the ids are expected in (RBAC scope).

webitel.kb.ResolveRequest.description: ResolveRequest selects articles by id within the given spaces.

webitel.kb.ResolveResponse.description: ResolveResponse returns the resolved article summaries.

webitel.kb.SearchResponse.description: SearchResponse is a page of article summaries.

space_ids.description: Spaces to search within (bot service scope).

top_k.description: Maximum number of chunks to return.

tag_match.description: How to combine the tag filter.

webitel.kb.SemanticSearchResponse.description: SemanticSearchResponse returns ranked chunks and optional citations.

language.description: Space language; immutable, drives full-text config and retrieval.

target_embedding_model_id.description: Target embedding model id for a pending model migration.

vector_search_enabled.description: Whether articles in this space are embedded for vector search.

rerank_enabled.description: Whether reranking is applied (default off, on for suggest).

home_article_id.description: Article used as the space home page; 0 if unset.

teams.description:
Teams the space is bound to as default operator visibility;
empty when no binding is configured.

updated_by.description: User who last updated the space.

webitel.kb.Space.description: Space is a knowledge-base space read model.

webitel.kb.SpaceList.description: SpaceList is a page of spaces.

customer_message.description: Latest customer message used as the query.

return_chunks.description: When true return chunks instead of article summaries.

webitel.kb.TagMatch.description:
Tag-filter combination mode.

 - TAG_MATCH_ALL: Default: match articles having ALL listed tags (AND).
 - TAG_MATCH_ANY: Match articles having ANY listed tag (OR).

webitel.kb.TreeNode.description: TreeNode is a single node of an article hierarchy tree.

notes.description: Optional notes for the new version.

webitel.kb.Versions.RestoreVersionBody.description: RestoreVersionRequest selects a version to restore.
